caption: This news broadcast from News18 India focuses on political developments in Bihar. The scene features a red and white graphic interface with a map of Bihar and images of several men. One man, dressed in white traditional Indian attire, is shown walking toward the center, while another man in white stands with his hands pressed together in a namaste gesture. Small portrait photos of other men are displayed on the sides, labeled with names like "संतोष सुमन", "सुमित कुमार", "सब्रत चौधरी", and "विजय सिंदहा". Prominent Hindi text reads "खेला का इशारा" centered over the map, and "मंत्री" is written above one of the portraits. As the sequence progresses, additional text appears at the top, stating "2024 में JDU के साथ 'खेला' होगा". The News18 India logo is visible in the upper right, and a timestamp of "10:04 PM" is displayed at the bottom.
